title: Lucid Stock Has Fallen 82% From Its 52-Week High. Could 2027 Be the Turning Point?
text: Lucid stock has experienced a dramatic decline of 82% from its 52-week highs, reflecting market concerns about the company's execution, profitability timeline, and capital requirements. Analysts debated whether 2027 could mark an inflection point as the Gravity SUV ramps production and robotaxi revenue begins materializing. The significant stock decline created potential opportunity for contrarian investors willing to bet on successful execution. However, bear case scenarios highlighted continued cash burn, competitive pressures from Tesla and traditional automakers, and execution risks. The valuation recovery would depend entirely on management's ability to demonstrate improving unit economics and clear paths to profitability.
